TO 6/30/99 AT 9:30 A.M.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO $5,200.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,200.00, JUDGMENT TO INCLUDE INTEREST AT AN ANNUAL RATE OF 10% FROM THE DATE OF ENTRY OF THIS JUDGMENT UNTIL PAID.
